feeds.title: 药物 · 临床试验
feeds.term: (lecanemab OR donanemab OR "anti-amyloid" OR "tau-targeting" OR trontinemab) AND ("clinical trial"[Publication Type] OR phase OR efficacy)

feeds.title: 机制 · 基础研究
feeds.term: ("Alzheimer Disease"[Mesh]) AND (amyloid OR tau OR neuroinflammation OR APOE OR microglia) AND (mechanism OR pathology OR pathogenesis)

feeds.title: 诊断 · 生物标志物
feeds.term: (Alzheimer) AND ("p-tau217" OR "plasma biomarker" OR "blood biomarker" OR "amyloid PET" OR "GFAP") AND (diagnosis OR detection OR screening)

feeds.title: 预防 · 生活方式
feeds.term: (Alzheimer OR dementia) AND (prevention OR diet OR exercise OR "cognitive reserve" OR lifestyle OR "physical activity") AND (cohort OR "risk factor" OR longitudinal)

feeds.title: 新手村 · 入门综述
feeds.term: ("Alzheimer Disease"[Mesh]) AND ("Review"[Publication Type]) AND (overview OR introduction OR "current understanding" OR primer OR basics)

drug.title: The mechanisms and strategies for Alzheimer's disease prevention: An update.
drug.zh: 综述更新了AD预防策略，强调控制高血压、糖尿病及补充微量元素等可干预因素可降低风险。

drug.title: Simulation of long-term lecanemab treatment effect on Alzheimer's disease progression.
drug.zh: 模拟显示，仑卡奈单抗治疗可将早期阿尔茨海默病进展至重度的时间延缓约4至5年。

drug.title: FDA Approval of Donanemab-azbt: A New Dawn in Alzheimer's Disease Treatment.
drug.zh: FDA批准donanemab靶向清除β-淀粉样蛋白，为阿尔茨海默病治疗开辟新路径。

drug.title: Redirecting Alzheimer's disease therapeutics: Multitarget drugs and complementary non-pharmacological strategies.
drug.zh: 阿尔茨海默病疗法转向多靶点药物及非药物联合策略，但多数证据仍停留在临床前或III期结果不一致。

drug.title: Macromolecular crowding inhibits degradation of alpha-synuclein amyloid fibrils induced by cathepsins and MMP9.
drug.journal: Protein science : a publication of the P
drug.zh: 脑内大分子拥挤环境显著抑制组织蛋白酶和MMP9对α-突触核蛋白淀粉样纤维的降解。

drug.title: Neuroinflammation-centered pathophysiology and therapeutic strategy design in Alzheimer's disease: Cutting-edge developments.
drug.zh: 阿尔茨海默病核心病理转向神经炎症，TREM2、NLRP3及补体通路成为关键治疗靶点。

drug.title: Evaluating emerging amyloid-β centric drugs for the treatment of Alzheimer's disease.
drug.zh: 新兴抗Aβ药物（如仑卡奈单抗、多奈单抗）证实降低淀粉样蛋白负荷可轻度减缓早期AD认知衰退。

drug.title: Novel hydroxytyrosol esters as potential anti-amyloid and neuroprotective agents for Alzheimer's disease.
drug.zh: 新型羟基酪醇酯通过增强稳定性和与Aβ肽结合，兼具抗淀粉样蛋白与神经保护双重活性。

mech.title: Neuroprotective Effects of Tenoxicam and Phenethyl Isothiocyanate in an Aβ₁₋₄₂-Induced Rat Model of Alzheimer's Disease: Modulation of NF-κB/NLRP3 Signaling and Redox Homeostasis.
mech.zh: 替诺昔康联合苯乙基异硫氰酸酯通过调控NF-κB/NLRP3通路和氧化还原稳态，在Aβ1-42诱导的AD大鼠模型中发挥协同神经保护作用。

mech.title: Bushen Huoxue Acupuncture alleviates alzheimer's disease progression via the E3 ubiquitin ligase SMURF2‑mediated ubiquitination of LAPTM5.
mech.zh: 补肾活血针刺通过SMURF2泛素化降解LAPTM5改善阿尔茨海默病认知与神经炎症。

mech.title: HDAC3 in Alzheimer's Disease: established evidence, unresolved questions, and translational priorities.
mech.zh: HDAC3在阿尔茨海默病中的致病证据薄弱，因果机制不明，转化前景受限。

mech.title: Inflammation profiles in Alzheimer's disease relate to cognition and neurodegeneration.
mech.zh: 阿尔茨海默病血浆炎症谱分为两型，其中促炎型与认知下降和神经退行性变独立相关。

mech.title: Elimination of tau tangles and soluble aggregates with the small molecule ACI-16664 prevents neurodegeneration in vivo.
mech.zh: 口服小分子ACI-16664选择性清除tau聚集体，在体内阻止神经退行性变。

mech.title: Acute viral encephalitis impacts dense-core amyloid plaque pathology and dysregulates myeloid responses to amyloid plaques.
mech.zh: 急性病毒性脑炎加剧致密核心淀粉样斑块病理，并扰乱髓系细胞对斑块的免疫应答。

mech.title: Plasma GDF15 affects long-term dementia risk and alters neuroimmune signaling.
mech.zh: 血浆GDF15通过神经免疫信号驱动痴呆风险，尤其与血管性痴呆关联强于阿尔茨海默病。

mech.title: Plasma and CSF adiponectin levels in biomarker-confirmed Alzheimer's disease: A cross-sectional study in a tertiary memory clinic.
mech.zh: 生物标志物确诊的阿尔茨海默病患者血浆脂联素升高、脑脊液/血浆比值降低，且与tau病理相关。

dx.title: Prior Traumatic Brain Injury and Alzheimer Disease Blood Biomarkers.
dx.zh: 退伍军人中，TBI史不影响p-tau217/Aβ42比值检测脑淀粉样蛋白的90%准确率。

dx.title: Anti-Metabotropic Glutamate Receptor 5 Autoimmune Encephalitis with a Typical Alzheimer's Disease Biomarker Profile: A Case of Rapidly Progressive Dementia Unresponsive to Cholinesterase Inhibitors.
dx.zh: 抗mGluR5自身免疫性脑炎可呈现典型阿尔茨海默病生物标志物，对胆碱酯酶抑制剂无应答。

dx.title: Plasma p-tau217 best captures early longitudinal cognitive changes in subjective cognitive decline compared with p-tau181 and NfL.
dx.zh: 血浆p-tau217在主观认知下降人群中比p-tau181和NfL更能预测早期纵向认知变化。

dx.title: [18F]RO948 Tau PET in early and late onset Alzheimer's disease: associations with plasma p-tau 217, atrophy and cognition.
dx.journal: European journal of nuclear medicine and
dx.zh: 早发型与晚发型阿尔茨海默病tau蛋白沉积模式差异显著，且与血浆p-tau217、脑萎缩及认知功能密切相关。

dx.title: Discovery-Driven Plasma Proteomics Identifies a Multi-Protein Signature for Amyloid PET Positivity: A Machine Learning Analysis of the Bio-Hermes Cohort.
dx.zh: 血浆蛋白质组学结合机器学习筛选出5种蛋白标志物，可有效区分脑内β-淀粉样蛋白PET阳性与阴性个体。

dx.title: Diagnostic Performance and Clinical Utility of Automated Plasma Amyloid-β 1-42/1-40 Assay.
dx.zh: 自动化血浆Aβ42/40比值检测在真实世界中对阿尔茨海默病连续谱具有良好诊断效能。

dx.title: Machine Learning-Based Multiclass Classification of Cognitive Stages Using Plasma Biomarkers, Clinical Assessments, and Genetic Features: A Repeated, Nested Cross-Validation Study in ADNI with External Evaluation in CNTN.
dx.zh: 血浆生物标志物与临床量表联合进行机器学习多分类时存在标签循环性，其增益可能非源于真实生物学信号。

dx.title: Diet Quality and Dementia Risk in Older Adults With Alzheimer Pathology.
dx.zh: 高饮食质量可降低阿尔茨海默病理阳性老年人的痴呆风险，且独立于神经退行与胶质生物标志物水平。

prev.title: Exploring the associations between dietary nitrate and nitrite intake and markers of self-reported periodontal disease in the UK Biobank cohort.
prev.zh: UK Biobank数据显示，膳食植物源硝酸盐摄入与牙周病风险降低相关。

prev.title: Impact of modifiable lifestyle factors on dementia subtypes and brain structural changes across KDIGO risk categories in the UK biobank.
prev.zh: 生活方式因素对痴呆风险的影响在肾功能中低风险人群中更显著，且与脑结构变化相关。

prev.title: Longitudinal Blood DNA Methylation Changes During Weight-Loss Intervention and Dementia Progression Risk.
prev.zh: 减肥干预引起的血液DNA甲基化变化与痴呆进展风险显著相关。

prev.title: Multi-domain AD risk burden and plasma biomarkers in cognitively unimpaired adults.
prev.journal: medRxiv : the preprint server for health
prev.zh: 多域风险负荷越高，认知正常老年人血浆p-tau181、p-tau217、GFAP水平越高，Aβ42/40比值越低。

prev.title: Cognition at the core of metabolic syndrome: linking metabolic load to behavioural impairment in a longitudinal high-fat diet rat model.
prev.zh: 长期高脂饮食大鼠模型中，代谢综合征的核心认知损害先于并驱动行为异常。

prev.title: Comorbidity sequence, sex, and APOE-genotype forecast Alzheimer's disease diagnosis.
prev.zh: 共病顺序、性别与APOE基因型可联合预测阿尔茨海默病诊断。

prev.title: Joint association of a healthy low-carbohydrate diet and frailty with the risk of incident Alzheimer's disease and vascular dementia: a prospective cohort study.
prev.zh: 健康低碳水饮食与衰弱状态联合显著影响阿尔茨海默病及血管性痴呆发病风险。

prev.title: The mechanisms and strategies for Alzheimer's disease prevention: An update.
prev.zh: 本综述强调通过管理高血压、糖尿病、补充微量元素与维生素及规律运动等可调控风险因素，是当前预防阿尔茨海默病的核心策略。

intro.title: HDAC3 in Alzheimer's Disease: established evidence, unresolved questions, and translational priorities.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑里一种叫HDAC3的蛋白可能和老年痴呆有关，但证据还不够，普通人可以知道未来可能靠它开发新药。

intro.title: From Tradition to Translation: A Critical Appraisal of Bacopa monnieri for Neuroprotection from Preclinical and Clinical Perspectives and Challenges in Utilization.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是“假马齿苋”这种草药能否保护大脑、延缓老年痴呆，帮普通人了解它到底有没有用、值不值得试。

intro.title: Neuroinflammation in Alzheimer's Disease (AD) and Glioblastoma (GBM): Shared Mechanisms and Therapeutic Insights.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲了大脑发炎在两种病里作用不同，看懂它，能帮你理解为啥治痴呆和脑瘤的思路可能互相借鉴。

intro.title: Battling Parkinson's and Alzheimer's: The Neuroprotective Power of Carnosic Acid.
intro.journal: Journal of biochemical and molecular tox
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是迷迭香里的一种天然成分如何保护大脑、对抗帕金森和阿尔茨海默病，帮普通人了解未来可能用到的食物防病思路。

intro.title: IL-4 in Alzheimer's Disease-Mechanisms and Therapeutic Potential.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑里一种叫IL-4的免疫信号物质，它既能帮大脑消炎，也可能加重老年痴呆，帮普通人看懂这个矛盾对预防有啥启发。

intro.title: Next-generation intranasal delivery nano-platforms for targeted brain therapy of Alzheimer's disease.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是通过鼻子喷药、绕过大脑屏障来治疗阿尔茨海默病的新方法，对外行来说，未来可能不用打针吃药就能更有效地治疗这种病。

intro.title: Targeting Brain Cholesterol Homeostasis in Alzheimer's Disease: Mechanisms and Therapeutic Perspectives.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑里的胆固醇怎么影响老年痴呆，看懂它就能明白为啥保持脑健康能预防记性变差。

intro.title: [Advances in Anti-Dementia Therapies in Older Adults].
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲了老年人痴呆症治疗的新进展，包括老药新用和能延缓病情的抗体药，让普通人知道现在有哪些更有效的选择。
